DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-06-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF S.P.W.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT AARON BLACKLEDGE, M.D.S RESPONSE TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE HIS VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION AND ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN TWENTY DAYS SERVICE OF A COPY OF ORDER HEREIN WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. A COPY OF THE SUBJECT REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SHALL BE ATTACHED TO THE ORDER AS AN EXHIBIT. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $1,500.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN THE AFORESAID TWENTY DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVE STEIN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

FOR PLAINTIFF S.P.W. -- DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/12/22 IS CONTINUED TO 1/9/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THIS IS THE FINAL CONTINUANCE AND THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERS THAT JURY FEES BE PAID BY EITHER SIDE BY 4:00 PM TODAY TO RESTORE JURY TRIAL. ALL DISCOVERY AND DEADLINES TO CORRESPOND TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE, AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MOVING PARTY TO SERVE SIGNED ORDER. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Spws Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded By Defendant Aaron Blackledge Md And Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded By Defendant Care Practice
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CARE PRACTICE, and AARON BLACKLEDGE, M.D.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff SPWS Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded By Defendant Aaron Blackledge MD And Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded By Defendant Care Practice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NOS 1-3,5,7-8.10-12,13 & 16 AS TO DEFENDANT AARON BLACKLEDGE AND DEFENDANTT CARE PRACTICE AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:
(1) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS ARE OVERRULED. WITH THE EXCEPTION OF ANY CLAIM OF A/C CLIENT PRIVILEGE OR A CLAIM OF PRIVACY. TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT BASED ON A CLAIM OF A/C PRIVILEGE OF A CLAIM OF PRIVACY, SHE WILL IDENTIFY THE WITHHELD DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICTY TO ENABLE DEFENDANTS TO CHALLENGE THE CLAIM.
(2) WITHIN FIFTEEN CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANTS A VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE IDENTIFYING THE SPECIFIC RFPDS TO WHICH THE PREVIOUSLY PRODUCED RECORDS OF DR. WILLIAM QUICK APPLY.
(3) AS TO THE ESI DOCUMENTS WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS AGREED TO PPRODUCE, SHE WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANTS A VERIFIED CODE COMPLIAN RESPONSE IDENTIFYING THE SPECIFIC RFPDS TO WHICH THEY APPLY. IF PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO RETRIEVE THE ESI DOCUMENTS SHE WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANTS A VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT EXPLANATION AS TO HER INABILITY TO RETRIEVE SUCH DOCUMENTS AND A STATEMENT THAT SHE HAS DELIVERED TO DEFENDANTS ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN HER CUSTODY OR CONTROL.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ANY PARTY.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne: Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Aaron Blackledge, M.D.S Response To Requests For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF S.P.W.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Aaron Blackledge, M.D.S Response To Requests For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel responses to the Requests for Production of Documents is unopposed and granted. The Defendant shall serve his verified responses without objection and all responsive documents within twenty days service of a copy of Order herein with Notice of Entry. A copy of the subject Request for Production of Documents shall be attached to the Order as an exhibit. Monetary sanctions are awarded as against plaintiff in the sum of $1,500.00 to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
